commit.message:
fix: autocomplete dropdown — two-line rows, full names, clean border

- Redesign suggestion rows to two-line layout:
  line 1: full product name (HighlightMatch, truncate on overflow)
  line 2: brand · category badge (smaller, secondary text)
  This eliminates the 'Ne...', 'A...' truncation by removing the
  badge from line 1 competition with the name
- Add right arrow icon to each row for clear affordance
- Fix dropdown border: use border-t-0 so it visually connects to
  the search input below its rounded-b-none bottom edge
- Raise z-index from z-40 to z-50 to ensure dropdown sits above
  all page content including sticky header siblings
- Footer keyboard hint: wrap each shortcut in its own flex span so
  it never clips on narrow viewports; add flex-wrap as fallback
- Remove dividers between rows (cleaner, gap replaced by hover bg)

commit.message:
feat(slice-7): admin invite flow, user management, security headers

Backend:
- UserInvite model + migration (g6b7c8d9e0f1)
- POST /api/v1/users/invite (admin only) — token_hash stored, invite URL returned
- POST /api/v1/users/accept-invite (public) — creates user, marks invite used
- GET /api/v1/users (admin only) — paginated user list
- PATCH /api/v1/users/{id} (admin only) — role change + deactivation w/ token revocation
- Audit log events: user.invited, user.invite_accepted, user.role_changed, user.deactivated
- SecurityHeadersMiddleware: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy
- CORS origins from CORS_ORIGINS env var
- Fixed Pydantic v2 validator ctx serialization in validation_exception_handler
- Settings: CORS_ORIGINS, FRONTEND_BASE_URL, INVITE_TOKEN_TTL_DAYS

Frontend:
- /accept-invite public page with password validation
- /admin/users page: user table, role dropdown, activate/deactivate, invite modal
- AdminRoute guard (redirects non-admins to /dashboard)
- Admin nav section in Layout (visible to admin role only)
- usersApi in lib/api.ts, user types in lib/entities.ts

Tests: 11 backend + 8 frontend (78 + 46 total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix duplicate account bug: single-user guard, data merge, telegram linking

Root cause: student logged in with 2 Google accounts, creating 2 user docs.
Both had telegram_chat_id=null, causing _get_student_uid to return random
user via non-deterministic limit(1) fallback. Weekly reports showed
inconsistent data (XP 190 vs 80).

Fixes:
- Add require_registered_user dependency to all endpoints (P0 guard)
- Handle TOCTOU race on first login (check existing_doc.id == uid)
- Block second Google account with 403 wrong_account
- Auto-link telegram_chat_id from telegram_links on first profile create
- Fix _get_student_uid fallback: order_by(created_at) for determinism
- Frontend: handle 403, show Ukrainian warning, sign-out resilience
- Data merge script: REST API, merges exercise_progress/sessions/achievements
- Diagnostic script for Firestore data inspection

Data migration executed:
- Merged Ch2MR...nCh1 (xp=80) into m9su3...feF2 (xp=190→220)
- Set telegram_chat_id=630005842 on canonical user
- Deleted duplicate user doc and orphaned achievements

Codex review: 4 cycles, APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS (P2 deferred: mock
semantics, tg link ordering). 174 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ui): add Realtime Events tab to team detail with structured event cards

Add a new "Realtime Events" tab in team detail page that displays WS events
in real-time via a centralized Zustand store + wildcard listener. Includes
structured card components for delegation, task, message, agent, and CRUD
events with agent name resolution from TanStack Query cache. Each card is
clickable to show raw JSON with syntax highlighting and copy support.

Also removes byte-based task truncation in delegation event payloads that
was corrupting multi-byte UTF-8 characters — now sends full task content.

commit.message:
fix(delegation): serialize announces per session to prevent stale history reads

Concurrent announce runs (delegate + subagent) on the same leader session
could read stale session history because the agent loop reads at start and
writes at end. Added per-session mutex via sync.Map to serialize announces,
ensuring each reads up-to-date history.

Also removed unnecessary task preview truncation in delegation events
(WS clients handle display formatting).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use greedy decoding for Florence-2 to avoid KV cache bug

Change num_beams from 3 to 1 (greedy decoding) to avoid
past_key_values NoneType error in beam search.
Remove problematic early_stopping and use_cache parameters.

commit.message:
Fix: onboarding never repeats after completion

Root cause: startOver() called clearMemory:true, wiping saved
platform/language/duration selections. Users tapping "Start Over"
(intending to pick a different mood) were forced to re-enter all
onboarding steps.

Changes:
- startOver() now preserves onboarding memory (clearMemory:false)
- GWOnboardingMemory backed by Keychain (belt+suspenders with UserDefaults)
- Keychain backup auto-restores if UserDefaults data is lost

commit.message:
Fix camera: use device ID enumeration instead of facingMode constraints

The facingMode constraint (both 'environment' and 'user') fails on
many Mac laptops. New approach:
1. Request camera permission with plain getUserMedia({video:true})
2. Enumerate cameras with Html5Qrcode.getCameras()
3. Pick rear camera by label if available, otherwise first camera
4. Start scanner with the device ID directly (no facingMode)

commit.message:
Fix mobile web: tap reliability, fullscreen API, and landscape handling

Tap reliability: Move touch detection from _unhandled_input to _input on
all menu screens (title, game over, level intro, victory). The old
approach failed because TextureRect/ColorRect nodes consume emulated
mouse events before they reach _unhandled_input. Also handle
InputEventMouseButton as fallback since some mobile browsers only
send emulated mouse events, not InputEventScreenTouch.

Fullscreen: Use browser Fullscreen API via JavaScriptBridge.eval()
instead of DisplayServer.window_set_mode() which doesn't work on mobile
web. Includes webkit prefix fallback for older Safari.

Landscape: Connect to viewport size_changed signal to release all active
touch fingers and redraw controls when orientation changes, preventing
stale finger state from persisting after the screen transform updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: consolidation orphan warning + auto-detect embedding provider

Phase 2 UX improvements:

1. Consolidation post-run hints:
   - Shows orphan count + prune suggestion when orphan rate > 20%
   - Shows consolidation hint when no memories reached SEMANTIC stage
   - Non-blocking: errors in hint generation don't fail consolidation

2. Embedding provider auto-detection (provider = "auto"):
   - Detection order: Ollama → sentence-transformers → Gemini → OpenAI
   - Ollama: checks localhost:11434, prefers bge-m3/nomic-embed-text
   - sentence-transformers: uses multilingual MiniLM (50+ languages)
   - Falls back to graph-only recall if nothing available
   - Lowers barrier for cross-language recall setup

Updated: config.py, unified_config.py, semantic_discovery.py,
tools.py, embedding-setup.md, README.md

button triggers a re-fetch via queryClient.invalidateQueries().
